turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good afternoon. I'd like to book a cardiac consultation if possible.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon! Absolutely. May I have your full name and a contact number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: My name is Vinod Chandrasekaran. Phone number is 9711234560.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Mr. Chandrasekaran. Our cardiologist Dr. Suresh Nair is available next Monday and Wednesday. Which would suit you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Wednesday works. What's the earliest slot?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The earliest on Wednesday is 9:00 AM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's actually perfect. Let's do 9 AM.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wonderful. Appointment booked for Vinod Chandrasekaran, Wednesday at 9:00 AM with Dr. Suresh Nair. Is there anything else you need?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No, that covers it. Thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Have a great day, Mr. Chandrasekaran!
